Admin inbox

Review queue, live site, rejected proposals, and archive.

Setup required

Configure Supabase (supabase-config.js) and run supabase/schema.sql before using the inbox.

Admin sign in

Reset password

Enter your email and we will send you a link to choose a new password.

Admin access only

This inbox is for PTA admins. Your account is signed in but does not have the admin role yet.

In Supabase SQL Editor, run supabase/promote-admin.sql, then sign out and sign in again.

Back to submit page

Signed in as

Submit page

Pending submissions waiting for approve or reject.

Content on the website. Use Revert to previous after an approved edit to undo one step. Archive removes an item from the site (moves to the Archive tab).

Published announcements

Published calendar events

Published competitions

Published clubs

Declined proposals. Approve to publish, return to queue to review again, or archive for cleanup.

Off-site items kept for history. Return to queue to review again, or delete permanently to clean up.

Archived submissions

Other archived items

Published items with no linked submission (e.g. legacy entries).

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
